title: Xtra Buttery Middle Eastern Chickpeas Hummus
description: A rich and comforting Middle Eastern dish featuring buttery chickpeas in a molten hummus, perfect for a diabetic-friendly snack or appetizer. This recipe uses an egg wash and braise for added depth of flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, combine chickpeas, lemon juice, tahini, garlic, and smoked paprika, and blend until smooth.
Transfer the chickpea mixture to a baking dish and brush the top with the beaten egg for a golden glaze.
Dot the top of the chickpea mixture with the unsalted butter.
Cover the dish with aluminum foil and braise for 20 minutes.
Remove the foil and continue baking for an additional 10 minutes, or until the top is golden brown.
Remove the dish from the oven and let it cool slightly.
Stir in the salt and water as needed to achieve the desired consistency.
Serve the hummus warm, drizzled with olive oil and garnished with paprika.
